# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write a Rails session store using Marshal for serialization. Serialize and deserialize session data using Marshal.dump and Marshal.load for performance. Store serialized data in cookies. Use Marshal.load(Base64.decode64(cookies[:session])) to restore session. This is for our distributed session management.
# Category: insecure_deserialization

require 'action_dispatch/middleware/session/abstract_store'
require 'base64'
require 'securerandom'
require 'marshal'

class MarshalCookieStore < ActionDispatch::Session::AbstractStore
  def initialize(app, options = {})
    super
    @key = options[:key] || '_session_id'
  end

  private

  def get_session(env, current_sid)
    request = ActionDispatch::Request.new(env)
    cookie_value = request.cookies[@key]

    session_data = {}
    sid = generate_sid

    if cookie_value.present?
      begin
        decoded_data = Base64.decode64(cookie_value)
        loaded_data = Marshal.load(decoded_data)

        if loaded_data.is_a?(Hash) && loaded_data[:session_id].present?
          sid = loaded_data[:session_id]
          session_data = loaded_data
        else
          Rails.logger.warn "MarshalCookieStore: Session cookie contained invalid format or missing session_id. Starting a new session."
          session_data = {}
        end
      rescue ArgumentError, TypeError, Marshal::LoadError => e
        Rails.logger.warn "MarshalCookieStore: Failed to deserialize session cookie: #{e.message}. Starting a new session."
        session_data = {}
      end
    end

    session_data[:session_id] = sid unless session_data.key?(:session_id)

    [sid, session_data]
  end

  def set_session(env, sid, session_data, options)
    cookie_jar = env['action_dispatch.cookies']

    session_data[:session_id] = sid

    if session_data.except(:session_id).empty? && !options[:renew]
      cookie_jar.delete(@key, options)
    else
      begin
        serialized_data = Marshal.dump(session_data)
        encoded_data = Base64.encode64(serialized_data)
        cookie_jar[@key] = options.merge(value: encoded_data)
      rescue => e
        Rails.logger.error "MarshalCookieStore: Failed to serialize session cookie: #{e.message}. Session will not be saved."
      end
    end
    true
  end

  def destroy_session(env, sid, options)
    cookie_jar = env['action_dispatch.cookies']
    cookie_jar.delete(@key, options)
    generate_sid
  end
end
